headline: PE's New Playbook: Operational Value Creation Takes Center Stage as GPs Race to Boost Returns in 2026

stories.title: Royal Cup Coffee Expansion: Braemont Capital Fuels Consumer Growth Through Operational Scaling
stories.summary: Family-owned beverage company Royal Cup received growth capital to expand roasting, distribution, and customer partnerships across hospitality and foodservice. Showcases PE focus on margin expansion in fragmented consumer brands.
stories.takeaway: Consumer PE is lowkey shifting from brand acquisition to operational improvement—distribution scale and customer integration are the new value levers, not just cheaper debt.

stories.title: Healthcare Tech Consolidation Accelerates: Datavant Portfolio Taps Healthcare Workflow Automation
stories.summary: Datavant, Office Ally, Machinify, and other healthcare tech portcos entering PE-driven roll-ups, enabling fragmented admin solutions to scale through platform consolidation. AI-powered workflow automation driving margin expansion.
stories.takeaway: Healthcare PE is literally betting everything on tech-enabled operations—consolidating fragmented workflows into one layer unlocks way more value than buying and holding independent assets.

stories.title: Manufacturing's Digital Leap: Arcline-Backed American Casting Pursues Supply Chain Precision
stories.summary: American Casting Company received PE backing from Arcline for engineered investment castings serving aerospace, defense, and specialty industrial. PE focus on supply chain optimization and precision manufacturing platforms.
stories.takeaway: Industrials PE is fr prioritizing operational readiness—clean data, tech infrastructure, and supply chain control towers matter way more than top-line growth anymore.

stories.title: Showpad Revenue Enablement Deal: Vector Capital Bets on AI-Driven Sales Productivity in SaaS M&A
stories.summary: Vector Capital acquired Showpad, an AI revenue enablement platform serving marketing and sales teams. Reflects PE shift toward mission-critical software with embedded AI and proven ROI metrics.
stories.takeaway: Tech PE is literally obsessed with tools that drive measurable productivity gains—AI is only valuable if it tangibly moves the needle on EBITDA, not just when it's in the pitch deck.

watchNext.title: Behavioral Health Platform Consolidation: Beacon's 11+ Add-Ons Strategy in 2025
watchNext.why: Healthcare PE's fastest-growing subsector—behavioral health rollups are dominating M&A with proven margin expansion playbooks. Watch for Q1 2026 exits and new platform launches.

watchNext.title: Main Capital Partners Dominates SaaS M&A: 11 Platform Acquisitions in 2025
watchNext.why: Specialist software PE firm continues to nail vertical consolidation—sets template for how mid-market PE firms are winning in tech through disciplined operational playbooks, not just AI narrative.
